titles.title: Man Shall Not Live by Bread Alone

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Man shall not live by bread alone, But by every Word; That proceeds from the mouth of God, Hallelu, Hallelujah!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I AM the Way, the Truth, and the Life, That’s what Jesus said; No man comes to the Father but by Me, Hallelu, Hallelujah!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Seek ye first the Kingdom of God, arid His righteousness, And all these things shall be added unto you, Hallelu, Hallelujah!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Knock and the Door will be opened unto you, Seek and ye shall find; Ask and it shall be given Unto you, Hallelu, Hallelujah!
